query: SELECT at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(at.id) as taskIds, GROUP_CONCAT(at.status) as statuses FROM approvalTasks at GROUP BY at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(at.id) as taskIds, GROUP_CONCAT(at.status) as statuses FROM approvalTasks at GROUP BY at.instanceId, at.stageId, at.assignedTo HAVING cnt > 1;
